'- Create research project folders: (research-start researchname_in_quotes topic_in_quotes)'
'- Mark research step done: (research-step researchname_in_quotes step_in_quotes result_in_quotes next_action_in_quotes)'
'- Pause for user approval: (research-checkpoint researchname_in_quotes message_in_quotes)'
'- Finish research and unload workflow: (research-complete researchname_in_quotes)'
'- Load a generated file into active context: (load-research-dynamic-instructions researchname_in_quotes filename_in_quotes)'
'- Get research directory: (researchDir)'
